response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering breadth (15+ years across web, mobile, embedded-adjacent work) and some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments, but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is not indicated, there is no demonstrated experience with embedded LAN-switch firmware, Linux kernel modification, or networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP). Recent work is primarily TypeScript/Node.js full-stack, which is a poor match for embedded C security development.
strengths: Long-standing software engineering experience with strong testing/TDD discipline
Some C/C++ background at National Instruments on developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or networking security (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF) experience
No demonstrated Linux kernel investigation or source modification work

key_factors.factor: C programming exposure at National Instruments
